name: Hikou
description: As an alternative to Kunai, these Tenno throwing stars do cause less Damage but they come with expanded Ammo Capacity and a higher Fire Rate.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: As an alternative to Kunai, these Tenno throwing stars do cause less Damage but they come with expanded Ammo Capacity and a higher Fire Rate.

components.name: Morphics
components.description:
An amorphous solid. Possibly Orokin technology.

Location: Mercury, Mars, Phobos, Europa, and Pluto

components.name: Plastids
components.description:
A disgusting nanite-infested tissue mass.

Location: Phobos, Saturn, Uranus, Pluto, and Eris

components.name: Rubedo
components.description:
A jagged crystalline ore. Gives off radiant energy.

Location: Earth, Lua, Phobos, Europa, Pluto, Sedna, and the Void

components.name: Salvage
components.description:
High value metals collected from war salvage.

Location: Mars, Jupiter, and Sedna

patchlogs.name: Nightwave: Prime Vault: Hotfix 30.6.1
patchlogs.changes:
Rhino Prime, Nyx Prime, Ankyros Prime, Boltor Prime, Hikou Prime, and Scindo Prime Relics have been added to the drop tables! These Relics have replaced the Zephyr and Chroma Prime Relics in the Void drop tables, Bounties, and Relic Packs.
Hikou Prime
Hikou Prime

patchlogs.name: Update 29.10.0: Corpus Proxima & The New Railjack
patchlogs.changes: Nyx Prime, Hikou Prime, and Scindo Prime Relics

patchlogs.name: Update 29.5: Deimos Arcana
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed Concealed Explosives not dealing explosive damage to nearby enemies when directly hit when equipped on Spira, Kunai, Hikou, Fusilai, or Despair.

patchlogs.name: Buried Debts: Hotfix 24.4.2
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Tarock Thrown Blade Skin not applying to the Spira Prime or Hikou Prime once thrown.

patchlogs.name: Octavia's Anthem: Update 20
patchlogs.additions: The Latron, Sicarus, and Hikou have all received PBR treatment.

patchlogs.name: Banshee Prime: Hotfix 19.11.5 + 19.11.6
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Spira and Hikou holsters clipping through Nidus’ legs.

patchlogs.name: The Glast Gambit: Hotfix 19.9.1
patchlogs.changes: Increased the flight speed of the Hikou in Quick Steel Conclave Variant.

patchlogs.name: The Silver Grove: Hotfix 3 (Nekros Prime!)
patchlogs.changes: Nyx Prime, Scindo Prime and Hikou Prime have entered the Prime Vault and their Relics are no longer obtainable in the game. If you already wield the power of these Primes, they will remain in your Inventory. If you already hold Relics in your inventory that house these Primes, they will remain in your inventory and you may continue to play them.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 18.1.3.1
patchlogs.changes: Fixed Hikou not being available for use in Conclaves.

patchlogs.name: Update 18.1.0
patchlogs.changes: Despair, the Hikou series and the AkStiletto are now available for use in Conclave.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.3.0
patchlogs.changes: T4D Rotation C: Forma BP for Hikou Pouch.

patchlogs.name: Hotfix 14.8.1
patchlogs.fixes:
Fixed an issue with the Hikou Prime having incorrect colouring when trying to customize energy colour (https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/314459-hikou-prime-colouring-bug/).
Fixed an issue with the Hikou Prime sound effect being unaffected by volume sliders. Additional tweaks to overall sound levels are included in this hotfix.

patchlogs.name: Update 14.8.0: Nyx Prime
patchlogs.additions: Nyx Prime, Hikou Prime, and Scindo Prime have emerged in the Void! Visit the Void today to begin your hunt for the latest Prime gear. See here for the starting location of this new content that will be updated as it's discovered: https://forums.warframe.com/index.php?/topic/172911-prime-gear-drop-locations/
patchlogs.changes:
including Nyx Prime, Hikou Prime and Scindo Prime. Plus, stock up on discounted Platinum and get Exclusive Gear available only through Prime Access!
Add the deadly Hikou and Scindo Primes to your Arsenal.

patchlogs.name: Update 13.5.0: Edo Armor & Nami Solo
patchlogs.changes: Fixed an issue with the Hikou Holster not properly utilizing custom Energy colors.

patchlogs.name: Update 10.3.0: Hump Day!
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed throwing animation (Kunai, Hikou) becoming jittery with fire rate increase.

patchlogs.name: Update 9.5: Operation Arid Fear
patchlogs.changes: Hikou fx trail now uses energy color.
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Hikou throwings stars so that they only have 1 flashlight beam pointing in the correct direction.
